tests.name: ALNS optimization with road distance works

fixes_applied.fix1_int_truncation: OR-Tools distance callback now uses meters (×1000) before int cast. Improved from 44.08 to 42.93 km (-2.6%)
fixes_applied.fix2_road_distance: total_distance_km now uses Mapbox Directions API road distance (110.56 km vs 43.40 km haversine). Falls back to haversine if Mapbox unavailable.
fixes_applied.fix3_stop_count: stop_count now matches stops array length (156, was reporting 155)
